last_task.subject: Resolve fleet escalation: iris blocked on task #205 — SSH key not registered with iris0btc GitHub account. Need human to either: (1) add SSH pubkey ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIACkLd9ck/EUVYYG6HCM0vpj/XotFNuATQtbPO/hmFxC to iris0btc GitHub account, or (2) create a GitHub PAT and run: arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>, then gh auth login --with-token
